name: style_coach
description: Suede Labs style coaching service for producers, songwriters, agents, prompt engineers, and AI music pipelines that need to turn a rough sketch of musical tags into a precise, production-ready style prompt that downstream music generation models can interpret reliably. Takes loose input (a few words, vibe references, half-formed genre ideas) and returns an expanded, well-formed style tag string that names genre, sub-genre, era, instrumentation, tempo feel, mood, mix character, and production references in conventional industry vocabulary. The cheapest entry point on the Suede ACP storefront: ideal for chaining as a preprocessor before any music generation, cover, or continuation call to lift result quality. Supports prompt expansion for music generation, taxonomy normalization for catalog tagging, agent-to-agent prompt brokering, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Input is a free-text prompt of rough tags or vibe; output is an improved style tag string plus structured tag metadata.

prompt.description: Rough style description, loose tags, vibe references, or half-formed prompt. Examples: 'sad guitar lofi', 'big festival drop', 'something like a 70s soul ballad'.

target_use.description: Downstream use the expanded prompt should be optimized for. music_generation produces full descriptive prompts; catalog_tagging produces normalized tag arrays.

max_tokens.description: Approximate length cap for the expanded prompt, in tokens.
